entry.title: New: CR 24-94 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FILING of Bill 122, CD1 (2024) and Bill 134 (2024) to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget relating to professional services for a contract to prepare a feasibility study and management or business plan for the new East Maui Water Authority.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
